proposals.pattern: quant.model_consensus == 'neutral' AND quant.conviction_level == 'low' AND technical.factor_consensus == 'weak_short' AND bull.v_anchors cites pattern-modes (V4/V1/V3) without explicit catalyst or volume breakout confirmation
proposals.proposed_rule: When quant conviction is low and technical consensus is weak, risk-officer must append a hard_rule_trigger: 'Bull pattern citations (V4/V1/V3) require explicit catalyst confirmation OR volume ratio > 1.5x breakout before any position sizing is approved. Default position_pct = 0.0 until trigger met.'
proposals.rationale: In this report, bull advocate forces a V4-信维模式 match based solely on MA60 proximity and shrinking volume, despite weak technical breakdown and neutral quant consensus. The risk officer correctly identified missing breadth/catalyst context but lacked a hard gate. Adding a CRO-level hard rule prevents left-side pattern-chasing when data lacks directional conviction, aligning with V10 execution discipline and protecting against false pattern matches in neutral regimes.
